headline: Here is Why Tyler Tech (TYL) is One of the Best Enterprise Software Stocks
summary: Tyler Technologies Inc. (NYSE:TYL) is one of the best enterprise software stocks to buy right now. On April 29, Tyler Technologies reported record-breaking Q1 2026 results, with total revenues rising 8.6% to $613.5 million. This growth was driven by a 10.4% increase in recurring revenues, which now account for ~88% of the company’s total top […]
